title: Westland 20600007 1.5 kg Epsom Salts Foliage Greener Fertilizer - Transparent
features: • Can be used as a granular feed or dissolved in water
• Ideal for use on vegetables such as tomatoes, broccoli, cauliflower and cabbage
• Can also be used to feed trees, shrubs and flowers
description: Product Description Westland Epsom sales foliage greener can be used as a granular feed or dissolve in water and apply to foliage. Suitable for feeding a variety of vegetables such as tomatoes, broccoli, cauliflower and cabbage, plus trees, shrubs and flowers. Directions 1. Apply Epsom Salts as a granular feed or dissolve in water. 2. Use for feeding tomatoes, brassica, winter bedding, and hedging. 3. Encourages strong and vibrant foliage. 4. Ideal for vegetables such as tomatoes, broccoli, cauliflower, and cabbage. 5. Can also be used to feed trees, shrubs, and flowers. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not ingest. If swallowed, seek medical advice. Wear appropriate protective clothing, including gloves and eye protection, when handling and applying the product. Always use in a well-ventilated area. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Box Contains 1 x Epsom Salts See more
